name: Modern Clean
description: Single-column layout with accent-colored section dividers and pill-style skills. Clean and contemporary.

name: Classic Professional
description: Traditional layout with two-column header, horizontal rules, and serif-style headings. Timeless and professional.

name: Compact
description: Two-column layout with sidebar for skills and education. Maximizes content per page.

name: Minimalist
description: Ultra-clean design with no color accents. Maximum readability with thin lines and ample whitespace.

name: Bold Statement
description: Strong visual hierarchy with accent background bars on section titles. Makes a bold impression.
